name: chart-pie-simple
visual_summary: Pie chart component that displays a simple pie chart to visualize data. It is typically used in reports or dashboards to compare different categories. This component is most suitable for applications that require straightforward data visualization without additional features or animations.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready chart component with the following characteristics:

Name: chart-pie-simple
Description: Pie chart component that displays a simple pie chart to visualize data. It is typically used in reports or dashboards to compare different categories. This component is most suitable for applications that require straightforward data visualization without additional features or animations.
Style: default, clean
Interactions: 
Tags: chart, pie chart, data visualization, reporting

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
